01 = Able to take injectable medication(s) at the correct times if: (a) individual dosages are prepared in advance by another person; OR (b)
another person develops a drug diary or chart.
02 = Able to take medication(s) at the correct times if given reminders by another person at the appropriate times based on the frequency of the
injection.
03 = Unable to take injectable medication unless administered by another person.
NA = No injectable
